name: subimage
description: Skills for AI agents working with SubImage, the cloud-native security platform. Setup recipes for IaC repos and operator workflows over the SubImage MCP server.

plugins.name: subimage-setup
plugins.description: Onboard cloud and SaaS data sources into SubImage from your IaC or CLI environment (AWS, GCP, Azure, GitHub, Kubernetes outpost). Terraform / CloudFormation / Helm / aws-cli / gcloud / az / gh paths.

plugins.name: subimage-mcp
plugins.description: Operator workflows over the SubImage MCP server: triage findings, investigate CVEs, review attack paths, and audit cartography coverage. Requires a connected SubImage tenant.
